zh.Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Warenne於1251年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素時，她的父親John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey20歲，母親Alice de Lusignan15歲。她於1268年9月與Sir Henry Percy II在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1282年在英國越可爾克雷文享年31歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾薩利。

zh-hans.Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Warenne于1251年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素时，她的父亲John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey20岁，母亲Alice de Lusignan15岁。她于1268年9月与Sir Henry Percy II在英国越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1282年在英国越可爾克雷文享年31岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾薩利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Warenne was born in 1251, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, her father, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, was 20 and her mother, Alice de Lusignan, was 15. She married Sir Henry Percy II in September 1268, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1282, in Craven, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Sawley, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Warenne est née en 1251, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice de Lusignan, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Percy II en septembre 1268, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1282, à Craven, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Sawley, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Warenne 1251 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey 20 und ihre Mutter Alice de Lusignan 15. Sie hat im September 1268 in York, Yorkshire, England Sir Henry Percy II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1282 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Craven, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Sawley, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Warenne è nata il nel 1251 nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, sua padre, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Alice de Lusignan, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Percy II nel settembre 1268, nel York, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1282, nel Craven, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Sawley, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Warenneが1251年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで生まれた時，父John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surreyは20歳，母Alice de Lusignanは15歳であった。1268年9月にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでSir Henry Percy IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1282年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクラベンで31歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアサウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Warenne(이)가 1251년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Lusignan(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1268년 9월 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 Sir Henry Percy II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1282년 영국 요르크실르 크레이븐에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 사w리에 묻혔다.

mn.Warren, Sussex, England: Warren, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Warenne nasceu em 1251, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Lusignan, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Percy II em setembro de 1268, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1282, em Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Warenne родилась в 1251 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Lusignan, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Percy II сентябрь 1268 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1282 г. в местности кравен, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности савли, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Warenne nació en 1251, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice de Lusignan, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Henry Percy II en septiembre de 1268, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1282, en Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
